creator: jkois@freebsd.org
text:
Hello,

thank you for your submission.  Unfortunately it is a little bit short 
on actual information.

Would it be possible to send an entry similar to the other ones under 
http://www.FreeBSD.org/usergroups.html?

Regards

jkois

-- 
  Johann Kois
  jkois(at)FreeBSD.org
  FreeBSD Documentation Project
  FreeBSD German Documentation Project - https://doc.bsdgroup.de
